subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam Qabl-Ḥusayn! Render thanks unto God that the countenance of the Wronged One hath turned toward thee and hath made mention of thee through verses which God hath ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل حسین اشکر الله بما توجه الیک وجه المظلوم و ذکرک بآیات جعلها الله
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
